Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.proofSimplifier2

Class SawyerNode

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.proofSimplifier2.DependNode
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.proofSimplifier2.SawyerNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofSkeleton
public class SawyerNode extends DependNode implements IProofSkeleton

  • Method Details

    • fromTreeNode

      public static SawyerNode fromTreeNode(IProofTreeNode proofNode)

    • getChildren

      public SawyerNode[] getChildren()

    • stickTogether

      public SawyerNode stickTogether(IProofMonitor monitor) throws ProofSawyer.CancelException
      Recursively stick parents to children together for the subtree rooted at this node, avoiding deleted nodes.
      Parameters:
      monitor -
      Returns:
      • null if the subtree rooted at this node is entirely deleted,
      • a sticked child if this node is deleted
      • or this node with sticked children
      Throws:
      ProofSawyer.CancelException - when the given monitor is cancelled

    • getSize

      public int getSize()

    • getChildNodes

      public IProofSkeleton[] getChildNodes()
      Description copied from interface: IProofSkeleton
      Returns the children of this node.

      This method always returns an array, even if this node is a leaf node (that is with no rule applied to it). It never returns null.

      Specified by:
      getChildNodes in interface IProofSkeleton
      Returns:
      an array of the children of this node

    • getComment

      public String getComment()
      Description copied from interface: IProofSkeleton
      Returns the comment field of this node.
      Specified by:
      getComment in interface IProofSkeleton
      Returns:
      the comment associated to this node
